description: 25 - 30-01-2025 - Email from lan Collard (former Chief Property and Security Officer, FCDO) to Corin Robertson (former Director General, Finance and Corporate, FCDO

participants.name: Email from lan Collard
participants.role: former Chief Property and Security Officer

text:
to Corin Robertson (former Director General, Finance and Corporate, FCDO

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - HR - MANAGEMENT

From: lan Collard * Personal
Sent: 30 January 2025 10:12
To: Corin Robertson Personal JCS

Subject: Personal/LPM

Dear Corin, JCS (for Olly),

An update. This information is provided in strictest confidence, to respect vetting confidence
principles, because Corin and Olly are directly in my line management chain as Chief Security
Officer.

ESND have approved the DV clearance of Lord Mandelson. He was sent notification and his
DV certificate by email (on Osprey) on the evening of 29 January 2025. It will be valid for
five years.

As part of the usual clearance process, UKSV identified some areas in his application for
ESND to review:

* Tunderstand that Lord Mandelson’s private sector engagements are being managed by
HRD and Legal Directorate through the conflict of interest process.

¢ With regard to personal conduct, I understand that Lord Mandelson has received a
letter from Mervyn Thomas, informing him of his responsibilities as an FCDO
employee, including under the Diplomatic Service Regulations.

72

* Matters pertaining to his overseas contacts will certainly be reviewed by the STRAP
Authorities. *** , 1am unable to assure about the
decision they will take. Their decision will determine the access that Lord Mandelson
has to the most sensitive information and meetings.

ESND shared with Lord Mandelson (and separately with JCS in Americas
Directorate) the STRAP application forms, which we have asked Lord Mandelson to complete
as an urgent priority. We will seek to expedite the processing of his application as soon as the
completed forms are retumed to us.

Best wishes,

Tan

Ian Collard | Chief Property & Security Officer and Director Estates, Security &
Network

Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office | Mobile: Personal
Chief of Staff: Personal Executive Officer:
Personal

Follow us online: www.gov.uk/fcdo

This email is intended for the addressee(s) only: All messages sent and received by the Foreign,
Commonwealth & Development Office may be monitored in line with relevant UK legislation

For latest news and information from Downing Street visit: http://www.gov.uk/number10,

Follow Number 10 on X (Twitter): http://x.com/10DowningStreet

Help save paper - do you need to print this email?

This email and any files transmitted with it are intended solely for the use of the individual(s) to
whom they are addressed. If you are not the intended recipient and have resend this email in
error, please notify the sender and delete the email.

This footnote also confirms that our email communications may be monitored to ensure the secure
and effective operation of our systems and for other lawful purposes, and that this email has been
swept for malware and viruses.

73
parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.

messages.subject: Personal/LPM
messages.body:
Dear Corin, JCS (for Olly),

An update. This information is provided in strictest confidence, to respect vetting confidence

ESND have approved the DV clearance of Lord Mandelson. He was sent notification and his

¢ With regard to personal conduct, I understand that Lord Mandelson has received a
